parent.decision: select get_config_manager in active data_source_config.py as next no-source decision / authorization target

candidate.active_route_registration: web/backend/app/router_registry.py imports app.api.data_source_config and includes data_source_config.router
candidate.current_dependency_shape: route handlers call get_config_manager() inside function bodies
candidate.current_runtime_dependency_export_shape: data_source_config.py imports router, get_current_user, and get_config_manager from _data_source_config_responses.py

authorized_future_lane.title: data-source config manager route provider injection
implementation_intent: introduce a route-local dependency/provider wrapper for DataSourceConfigManager
inject the manager into the 9 active route handlers that currently call get_config_manager() in route bodies
preserve the default backing get_config_manager() behavior
preserve router registration, route paths, response models, auth/current_user dependencies, and OpenAPI exposure
exit_criteria: active data_source_config.py route-body get_config_manager() calls are 0
active data_source_config.py route dependency uses for the manager are 9
legacy data_source_config.old.py calls remain classified as false positives and are not edited
app/OpenAPI smoke remains routes=548 and paths=500 unless an unrelated current-HEAD change explains drift

decision.selected_next_gate: G2.233 data-source config manager route provider injection
decision.reason: The seam is HIGH risk but concentrated in one active route module. A path-limited provider injection can remove route-body singleton calls while preserving route contracts and the existing backing getter.

verification_targets.app_openapi_smoke: routes=548, paths=500 expected at current HEAD
